title: Tree's Kebabs
body:
Welcome to **Tree's Kebabs**, I made this mod for a friend that dared me to make a mod. It only adds kebab, thats it.

Items added:
- **Doner Kebab**
- **Kebab Painting**

You can make the **Doner Kebab** with:
- 1 tomato
- 1 cabbage leaf
- 1 bread
- 1 raw potato
- 1 cooked chicken

The **Kebab Painting** is just a painting of a small kebab.

**For modpack makers, you can use this mod freely in your modpack.**

You can see the recipe in photos.
**Enjoy your meal!**
